title: Fix release 0.3.6 Windows installer paste and guidance
acceptanceCriteria: Windows interactive Telegram token paste accepts terminal paste chunks with trailing newline or CRLF and preserves installer-native validation/masking.
Windows interactive allowed user ID paste accepts at least one pasted numeric ID and preserves typed input/navigation behavior.

Installer/bootstrap guidance explicitly names supported non-Docker infra alternatives such as system Redis or external REDIS_URL and no longer implies Docker is the only path when alternatives are already supported.
Release metadata is updated to 0.3.6 with changelog and release notes, and release validation passes.
